title: Zhuhai, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zhuhai, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zhuhai is a city in Guangdong with a population of 2,439,000. A coastal resort city in Guangdong, known for its pleasant climate, beaches, and as a special economic zone connected to Macau by bridge.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
